svg.title: Observer Patch Holography Status DAG
svg.desc: A README-facing map of fixed-point constants, theorem surfaces, observer-like self-reading patches, and explicit proof boundaries.

g.text: A README-facing map of fixed-point constants, theorem surfaces, observer-like self-reading patches, and explicit proof boundaries.
Top: axioms and bridge packages. Middle: derivation spine. Bottom: branch completions and global closure.
P and N_CRC are fixed-point closure values, not tunable empirical
Explicit conditional branches and remaining bridge burdens.
These roadmap goals mark open proof and publishing fronts.
cap modular flow locks to geometric dilation
GR recovered up to Lambda g_ab
unitary Tannaka group; MAR selects the SM afterward
SU(3) x SU(2) x U(1) route
massless photon / graviton, charge quantization, proton stability
selected chart, conditional value law, inverse
no nonzero source-only physical W/Z pole mass
conditional split on declared running and
no nonzero source-only physical Higgs/top mass
finite digital CFQ schema and central-record
generic interface has six dimensionless Yukawa
source-only hadron masses require a production
README local surface is explicit and branch-conditional
stated local extension surface gives ellbar_shared = ellbar_SU(2)
same D10 pixel law fixes ellbar_shared = P/4 for the local G
Local Unit Bridge and Constant Status
a_cell -> meters, seconds, GeV, Kelvin; settle hbar and k_B
strong-CP status issue #155 plus horizon/BH information fronts
continuation claims stay explicit rather than promoted
no-signaling + Tsirelson; exact saturation on an explicit
emit or explicitly block physical Majorana phases
2D YM bridge survives; larger string lift remains continuation
closure map, invariant sector, and modular-time wrapper
speculative addenda are kept out of the proved core
issue #166 is closed; keep drift demoted
axiom and dependency ledger are hardened
remaining Phase I gaps are tracked rather than hidden
open reality-paper issues define the Phase II program
Recovered core + exact sidecars are real.
Rose completion nodes are planned closure results for completed OPH. Cyan and blue nodes are theorem/output structure articulated in the paper set.
